    p=Path(p)

    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}

    status='real_response_retry_queued'

elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_runtime_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 retry Claude dispatcher runtime proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='runtime_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick; verify Claude runtime state'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_dispatch_result_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 retry dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='dispatch_result_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick; verify workflow_dispatch_results'
else:
    status='unknown_missing_state_reverify'

Path('governance/reports/bem844_execute_bem843_next.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Execute BEM-843 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)

changed=['governance/state/bem844_execute_bem843_next.json','governance/reports/bem844_execute_bem843_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
